title: The Gathering Storm
overview: It's 1931 and, while Nancy lives in vain hope that her boyfriend Hamish will propose, her younger sister Diana has it all.

title: Girl on the Rebound
overview: Christmas 1932 is a gloomy one for the Mitfords, with Diana banished in the wake of her divorce. But unforeseen tragedy plunges the family into even deeper scandal.

title: Sparks Light Fires
overview: Nancy gets to work on a new novel, but life becomes stranger than fiction.

title: Hating and Loving
overview: The Mitfords are blindsided by news of Unity's encounter with Adolf Hitler.

title: Oysters and Champagne
overview: Nancy finds herself persona non grata as the family gather around Diana's bedside.

title: Point of No Return
overview: Nancy must confront her Peter about their future together.
